seoTitle: Squarespace Overlay Scroll Effect: Step-by-Step Setup
metaDescription: Add a modern overlay scroll effect to your Squarespace site to boost engagement and give visitors a more interactive scrolling experience.
intro: An overlay scroll effect layers content so it appears to float above the page as visitors scroll, giving your Squarespace site a more polished, modern feel. This guide walks through setting it up so you can use it for product launches, portfolios, or general brand polish without touching complex code.

steps.heading: Understand what the overlay scroll effect does
steps.body: The effect creates a layered scrolling experience where sections appear to stack or overlay one another as the visitor moves down the page, adding visual depth.

steps.heading: Apply the effect to a section
steps.body: Add the effect to the section or page block where you want the layered motion to happen, following the steps demonstrated in the tutorial.

steps.heading: Customize for your theme
steps.body: Adjust styling so the effect matches your site's existing colors and fonts, keeping the look consistent across your Squarespace theme.

steps.heading: Check mobile responsiveness
steps.body: Preview the effect on mobile devices to make sure the scroll behavior still looks smooth and doesn't disrupt the reading experience on smaller screens.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot common issues
steps.body: If the effect doesn't render as expected, revisit the section settings and confirm the effect is applied to the correct block or page area.

faq.question: Does the overlay scroll effect slow down my site?
faq.answer: It shouldn't meaningfully affect load times when applied to a section or two, but heavy use across many sections could impact performance, so test after adding it.

faq.question: Can I use this effect on any Squarespace template?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers applying it within Squarespace's page tools, so it should work across templates that support the sections being modified, though the exact look can vary by theme.

faq.question: Will this work well on mobile?
faq.answer: The tutorial includes tips for mobile responsiveness, so you can adjust the effect to display cleanly on smaller screens.

faq.question: Is coding knowledge required?
faq.answer: No, the tutorial is designed to be beginner-friendly and doesn't require prior coding experience.

faq.question: Can I undo the effect if I don't like it?
faq.answer: Yes, since it's applied through Squarespace's built-in section settings, you can remove or adjust it at any time.
